reviews.title: The hotel is a disgrace
reviews.text:
We had been to the Hilton hotel with lot of expectations considering the brand but unfortunately the experience was a mere disappointment. I would never like to visit any of the Hiton hotels again. While they rate themselves a five-star hotel, but I would not even rate them a single start, they in the name of a hotel is a disgrace to the humankind, and the staff lack any kind of empathy. 
To begin with I got a very negative feeling when I checked in to the hotel, I had requested for an early check in but they told they were at full capacity during the off season at April. To my surprise I was charged 2,300 in the name of upgrade just to check in early. I would like to stress that they have no concept of early check in and please be aware of these thugs just trying to extract money. I felt it was a very cheap way of Hilton making money in such manner, may be it reflects the character of people seated there at the reception. It was just 1.5 hours early, even a local hotel would not do such a thing in the name of business. I call this the most cheap ways of looting guest. Also, he handed over me two extra cookies to add to the cheap behavior.
This hotel is not at all suited for families with infants or small children, to my surprising they do not allow any kind of heating device in they so called king size room. There is a need where families would like to heat baby food or milk in the room or even sterilize the bottles, however as per they stupid hotel policy, this is not allowed. Further the price they charge is way too expensive compared to other Star Hotels. I have a kid with special needs where I carry a travel cooker to head her food, basically I carry frozen food which I heat for 10 minutes and they give it to my kid to eat. I tried explaining to the manager at the hotel that the requirement is one of kind and was required to use it only for 10 mins before lunch, however they fail to understand the need. 
Further to the twist, if I had known that this is their hotel policy where they lack any kind of empathy, and I am not sure if they need to be in the hospitality business. Well Double tree by Hilton Goa, Arpora may have won with their hotel policy, but they fail to understand a family with needs, had just been to have some quality time with my little 5 year old kid, but unfortunately Hilton failed to understand. 
Your bathrooms stink and are very small, with leaking water. The staff is laidback and have to call them multiple times to clean the room. The room did not even have basic stuff like toothpaste or a shaving razor.
In conclusion my suggestion is if you find anything restricted in your scanning device, please let the guest know then and there only, Why the hell on earth do you want to charge me for the whole stay and then after few hours get back to me with restrictions. While I truly enjoy goa as a place and did not have any other issues, the main disappointment was my stay at Hilton. You may get a five star rating from someone but me as a parent of a special needs child I rate your hotel a disgrace in the name of hospitality, your staff needs to get trained and if there was something worst than 1 star I would have given you that as well. I have been to multiple star hotels both at India and abroad and I truly now know where Hilton hotel stands.

reviews.title: Horrific disregard for guest safety
reviews.text:
The Incident:

On the day of our checkout, we had pre-booked a private cab. We were informed that the local taxi union was blocking our driver from entering the hotel premises. As a "solution," the Duty Manager,***, instructed us to walk approximately 500 meters to the main entry gate to meet our cab.

Upon arriving at the gate with our children, we walked directly into a volatile physical altercation between the taxi union and our cab driver. The situation was so severe that the police were already on the scene.

Terrified for our family's safety, we called the hotel front desk for immediate assistance. Shockingly, the staff was entirely apathetic. We were told that this union dispute is an "old issue well known on social media," and it was heavily implied that it was our fault for not researching the local conditions before arriving.

The Core Grievance:

It is completely unacceptable that Hilton management expects guests to monitor local social media for security threats. More importantly,*** and the hotel staff knew about this ongoing, volatile dispute. Despite knowing the risks, *** deliberately directed a family with young children to walk out of the secure hotel zone and directly into an active, potentially violent altercation.

This is not a mere customer service failure; this is gross negligence and a complete disregard for human safety. The local management team was utterly unapologetic and failed in their primary duty of care to their guests.

reviews.title: Don’t go
reviews.text:
Stayed at DoubleTree by Hilton Arpora, Goa and honestly it was quite disappointing.

The location is very inconvenient , it’s far from everything and there’s absolutely nothing around the hotel. If you’re planning to stay here, having your own vehicle is a must, otherwise getting around becomes a hassle.

The hotel itself lacks basic amenities. Apart from a small swimming pool, there’s really nothing much to do within the property. For a hotel that claims to be 5-star, this is quite underwhelming.

The food is another downside, the menu is overpriced and doesn’t justify the cost at all. On top of that, the service is poor. The staff hardly answer the phone, which is frustrating when you need assistance.

Breakfast was probably the worst part of the stay. Very limited options and the quality was nowhere close to what you’d expect from a 5-star hotel.

Overall, not worth the price or the hype. Would not recommend staying here unless major improvements are made.

reviews.title: A Disappointing Experience at DoubleTree by Hilton Apora Goa
reviews.text:
DoubleTree by Hilton Apora Goa, a renowned brand in the hospitality industry, fell short of expectations during my recent stay. subpar food and an unpleasing restaurant ambiance, my experience left much to be desired.

Upon entering the hotel, I expected a high level of comfort synonymous with the Hilton brand. Unfortunately, the reality was quite different. The disappointment extended to the restaurant, where the ambiance was described as "stinky," and the presence of flies around the dining area, including my son's head, was highly unappetizing.

The culinary aspect of the stay proved to be another letdown. The quality of the food was deemed "pathetic," a stark contrast to the elevated standards typically associated with Hilton establishments. It is disheartening when a hotel of this caliber fails to meet basic expectations in terms of culinary experiences.

While breakfast managed to salvage some satisfaction, dinner was deemed unworthy of the Hilton brand. This inconsistency in the dining experience further contributed to the overall sense of dissatisfaction.

One notable aspect that added to the disappointment was the unexpected charge for recreational activities. Guests were required to pay for playing carrom or pool, a surprising policy for a brand that usually prides itself on providing a comprehensive and enjoyable stay experience. Such additional charges can be seen as a departure from the inclusive and luxurious image that Hilton hotels strive to maintain.

The disparity between expectations and reality was a significant factor in the overall disappointment. As patrons of the Hilton brand, we naturally had high expectations, but the reality fell short in multiple aspects. This incongruity leaves guests feeling stunted after check-in, especially when presented with unexpected charges for amenities that are typically considered complimentary.

In conclusion, my stay at DoubleTree by Hilton Apora Goa was far from the luxurious and enjoyable experience one would anticipate from the Hilton brand. unappetizing food, and unexpected charges for recreational activities marred what could have been a memorable stay. While Hilton hotels are generally associated with excellence, this particular establishment failed to meet the high standards expected from such a reputable brand. The disappointment experienced during my stay underscores the importance of consistent quality across all aspects of hospitality, particularly for renowned brands like Hilton.

reviews.title: Not upto the standards of Hilton
reviews.text:
Stayed here for a night. To begin with, the check-in process was smooth and the public areas were well maintained. However, the elevators felt extremely outdated for a brand like Hilton. Having been a hotelier myself, I can 
Stayed here for a night. To begin with, the check-in process was smooth and the public areas were well maintained. However, the elevators felt extremely outdated for a brand like Hilton. Having been a hotelier myself, I can honestly say I’ve never come across elevators this old in any property till date.

The rooms, on the other hand, were good. The bed, linen, and both the hard and soft pillow options were good and ensured a comfortable stay. Careline response, however, was rather slow.

The buffet breakfast was decent, though nothing particularly memorable. The idli was by far the worst I’ve ever had at any hotel or resort, and the dessert selection was quite limited as well.

Coming to the most important aspect — the bathroom. While it was otherwise fine, there wasn’t a single hanger, towel rod, or hook to place a towel or clothes. Seriously? Is this even up to Hilton standards?

I had also informed the property that it was my parents’ wedding anniversary, but nobody seemed to care or make even the smallest gesture.

Overall, this has been the most disappointing Hilton property I’ve visited, and unfortunately, I would not return.

reviews.title: Mixed experience
reviews.text:
The Doubletree by Hilton Hotel in Goa boasts spacious and tidy rooms. We stayed in a lagoon room with a decent view that added a pleasant touch to our experience. However, the bed was somewhat uncomfortable, leaving me with lingering back pain.

Regarding dining, the food prices were steep, as anticipated in a 5-star establishment, yet the taste and quality didn't match the elevated standards expected. The complimentary breakfast was good, but compared to similar hotels, the variety seemed somewhat limited.

During our stay around Christmas time, the breakfast rush led to waiting for a table, which is understandable. Regrettably, there was a lack of organization, with some guests bypassing the wait while others, who had been waiting longer, were overlooked.

The in-room service was passable. Housekeeping was inconsistent, as they missed our room for two consecutive days, even with the indication for service turned on. Furthermore, basic amenities like in-room slippers were absent, although promptly provided upon request.

Parking arrangements were disappointing. Guests were directed to a dusty field behind the hotel for parking, necessitating a walk back to the lobby. The disparity in parking, reserving better spots for hotel cabs while guests were left in a dusty area, led to unnecessary inconvenience and soiled footwear.

In summary, these aspects might be acceptable in a lower-tier 5-star or 4-star hotel, but considering experiences at other accommodations like Fairfield by Marriott or The Fern, I expected a more refined and organized experience from Doubletree by Hilton Goa.

reviews.title: Disappointing Stay at DoubleTree by Hilton
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at the DoubleTree by Hilton and was quite disappointed with the overall experience. The hotel feels very old, and the facilities clearly need upgrading. The room I stayed in was not up to the mark at all. There was a persistent pungent smell even after housekeeping cleaned it, which made the stay uncomfortable.

Room service was extremely slow, adding to the frustration. We also faced multiple issues inside the room— the bathroom light wasn’t working, and the bathroom lock literally broke with just a light touch. These are basic things that should never be a problem at a hotel claiming to be five-star quality.

Overall, the property lacks the facilities and standards expected from a 5-star hotel. Unfortunately, it did not feel worth the price, and I would not recommend staying here until significant improvements are made

reviews.text:
The staff were courteous, my request on adjacted rooms was duly met. property was good and the breakfast spread was really great! 

The downside however; we had zero internet connectivity. No WiFi no mobile network to use our own data either. The staff were courteous however were completely unable to solve the issue. Me and my fly of 7 were without internet or network  for the three days we stayed there. 

Another downside is the parking, parking is quite a walk from the property lobby and there is no valet service. Hence it becomes difficult when it rains. 

Another noticeable thing was the house keeping issues : usually from my experience I have noticed there will be dental kits and shaving kits replaced after use or while the paste is empty but it wasn’t the case here. Infact the shaving kit was kept only on request. No hand towels no bathrobes (I suggest they include these for the convenience of your customers). Also the bathroom door mat was missed by the house keeping every day and had to be asked for every time. 

My room in specific had dead bugs lying on the floor every night and I had no idea where they were coming from.

reviews.title: Stay was good
reviews.text:
We stayed in a Deluxe Suite for 5 days, and overall, the experience was good. The location is decent, with the advantage that most North Goa beaches are at a convenient distance. Grocery stores, cafés, ice cream shops, and restaurants are all nearby. Scooty rentals are available within walking distance inside the premises, and on-call taxi service for airport drop-off is also available at affordable rates.
The breakfast menu was fairly repetitive, with little to no variation across days. One area that was disappointing was the Wi-Fi service. We faced issues, and the staff asked us to remain in the room for testing without providing any clear ETA, which was inconvenient.
That said, the staff was very polite and helpful. We had requested birthday decorations, which were done nicely. The in-house cake was absolutely delicious, and the complimentary cookies were fresh and tasted great. The food overall was good.
They offer two payment options for food: either deposit an advance amount at check-in and settle the bill at checkout, or pay each time you order. This was a new experience for me, though I’m sure they have their reasons for this policy.

reviews.title: Amazing weekend trip
reviews.text: The stay at DT by Hilton was amazing. I had booked a room with private pool. The checkin was smooth and room was in immaculate condition. The indoor pool was clean and even pool cleaning was done the next day. The breakfast was decent with adequate options. The location was on the main road itself. Although the menu was little on the expensive side with limited in room dining options but being a premium hotel the price can be justified. The main pool was of good size with adequate depth and clean water. There are a ample of good restaurants at a walkable distance from the hotel. Also the zomato does delivery at the hotel. They also have car and bike rental at the location but mind the prices which may be premium when compared to outside. Overall it was a wonderful stay at DT by Hilton. Kudos to the staff for making our trip memorable.

reviews.title: Good hotel, enjoyed staying there .good food .nice for the family
reviews.text:
V stayed for two nights ..with breakfast and dinner .v opted for a pool view ..3 adults and a child ..
They didnot charge any thing for our child ,
.....rooms are spacious and super clean pool view is very good.....
Room service is excellent...ask for extra towel ,iron box etc it will come in within 5 mins.
Food: as I said v opted for breakfast and dinner while booking ....it is really worth opting dinner as v hd our aged mother with us ...moving out in d night in search of food wud hv been difficult.....
Breakfast with a decent spread and dinner too ...food was super tasty ..
A proper fish item was missing in d menu .....I hope in future they will take care of this...
Coming to Goa and staying in Hilton and there is no fish in the menu.....it is some thing which one can't believe and surely it will disappoint u.
Im saying there was fish dish  like some ordinary one with Schezwan sauce ...it was pretty ordinary....in fact I was expecting proper sea fish item...

When u enter d hotel u won't find it "waw "kind of feeling ...it is looks just ordinary different from d images shown in d booking site....but nevertheless it is manageable....
But once u enter d room u will be satisfied ....and that too d pool view room is very good .
Staffs are very friendly they will not disappoint u...
Swimming pool : very good , big one and also has kids pool.
They hv dedicated pool staff to take care of d guests ....and really very much pleased to see d guy in charge is very caring and supportive ....and especially when children are swimming he will ensure xtra care for their safety.......during whole pool time he was around d pool....
Staff at reception are very polite and they hv given us some extension of one hour during check out....
During breakfast they served Bacon (a,pork dish)...I just liked it..fruits are very fresh and juicy.
there is a small garden ...property is not spread in bigger plot.....ok manageable ....
Locality in terms of access to Calangute ,Baga,candolim is very convenient....
Overall I will surely recommend this property to my friends .......
Especially a very decent property for d family....
reviews.response:

It’s wonderful to hear that our family-friendly environment, convenient location, and warm hospitality contributed to a memorable stay.
 
We look forward to welcoming you and your family again soon.

Warm regards,

Mithun Rao,
General Manager

reviews.title: A hospitable stay
reviews.text:
My stay began with an issue with my room. On reaching out to the management, the room was changed and none of the issues of the previous room prevailed. 

What I found to my joy was the cheerful and helpful nature of the staff and their readiness to understand needs of guests and provide solutions.

Mr. Mayank Kalhan can be seen walking all over the property with a keen eye for detail. You can see him serving guests at the breakfast along with his staff.

This property is in a gated compound shared by an apartment building and some smaller establishments. This is a very safe place for guests. A lot of parking spaces are available for guests who bring their vehicles.

The disappointing bit is the dinner service @Flame. 

What I will remember my stay @The Double Tree for is the ever smiling, hard working staff. They made this place a pleasure to stay at.

We would come to restaurant during the closing hours, yet he greeted with a smile  always and got us hot Rotis from the kitchen.. Housekeeping was also fantastic  as the room was kept super clean by the time we would return..Pool table and Lifts (both) however are in need of replacement as they seem to be in fag end of their lifetime... Overall,  Great customer service will make you oversee the minor flaws of the property !!!
